recommendations.title: Good Luck Charlie, It's Christmas!
recommendations.overview: Teddy Duncan's middle-class family embarks on a road trip from their home in Denver to visit Mrs. Duncans Parents, the Blankenhoopers, in Palm Springs. When they find themselves stranded between Denver and Utah, they try to hitch a ride to Las Vegas

recommendations.title: The Ewok Adventure
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Wicket the Ewok and his friends agree to help two shipwrecked human children, Mace and Cindel, on a quest to find their parents.

recommendations.title: Teen Beach 2
recommendations.overview: When characters from the movie musical “Wet Side Story” get stuck in the real world, teens Brady and Mack must find a way to return them home.

recommendations.title: The Boy Who Cried Werewolf
recommendations.overview: A Californian family inherits a castle in Romania. This is especially exciting to the son, who is obsessed with monsters. And he is not disappointed.

recommendations.title: Hilda and the Mountain King
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Family, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: When Hilda wakes up in the body of a troll, she must use her wits and courage to get back home, become human again — and save the city of Trolberg.

recommendations.title: Christmas...Again?!
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Fantasy, TV Movie, Drama
recommendations.overview: Rowena "Ro" is a high-spirited 11-year-old hoping to add more spunk to her Christmas celebrations when her parents’ divorce is going anything but smoothly.

recommendations.title: Survival of the Dead
recommendations.overview: Off the coast of North America, locals simultaneously fight a zombie epidemic while hoping for a cure to revert their undead relatives back to normal.

recommendations.title: Double, Double, Toil and Trouble
recommendations.genres: Family, TV Movie, Horror, Comedy, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: On Halloween night, two precocious little girls try to save their parents from their nasty old capitalist aunt's greedy clutches. Magic abounds and they meet mysterious new friends along the way.

recommendations.title: Spider Baby
recommendations.overview: In a dilapidated rural mansion, the last generation of the degenerate, inbred Merrye family lives with the inherited curse of a disease that causes them to mentally regress from the age of 10 or so on as they physically develop. The family chauffeur

recommendations.title: Ju-On: Black Ghost
recommendations.overview: The supernatural grudge manifests itself by way of a strange cyst growing in the body of a young woman, slowly draining all life from her in revenge for... what?
